characters.appearance: Young female, fair complexion, red hair pulled back, large brown eyes.
Young female, fair complexion, blonde hair pulled back, blue eyes.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Sorry, मेरी English इतनी अच्छी नहीं है। [Sorry, my English is not that good.]
Character A says: कोई बात नहीं, बस रोज़ practice करनी चाहिए। [No worries, you just need to practice daily.]
Character B says: But practice किसके साथ करूँ? [But who do I practice with?]
Character A says: उसी के लिए तो मैं हूँ! मैं Supernova हूँ, आपकी AI English tutor. [That's exactly what I'm here for! I am Supernova, your AI English tutor.]
Character B says: क्या मैं आपसे बात कर सकती हूँ? [Can I speak with you?]
Character A says: बिल्कुल! हम रोज़ बात करेंगे, मैं आपकी pronunciation ठीक करूँगी, और हर conversation के साथ आपकी English बेहतर होगी। [Absolutely! We will talk every day, I'll correct your pronunciation, and with every conversation your English will get better.]
Character B says: पर मैं बहुत mistakes करती हूँ। [But I make a lot of mistakes.]
Character A says: Mistakes से घबराना नहीं है, मैं हूँ ना आपको guide करने के लिए। [Don't be afraid of mistakes, I am here to guide you.]
Character B says: ये सही है! [This sounds good!]
Character A says: तो चलो, रोज़ साथ में practice करते हैं। Supernova के साथ confidence से English बोलना सीखो! [So come on, let's practice together every day. Learn to speak English with confidence with Supernova!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the learner feels insecure about their English and lacks a speaking partner.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as a practical, accessible solution.
- Reassures the user that making mistakes is okay, positioning the app as a safe, non-judgmental space.
- Ends with a warm, encouraging call to action to practice daily and build confidence.
